judgment.summary: Rapidly growing revenue but deeply unprofitable with significant debt and negative cash flow.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimate by 16.3%; next earnings date 2026-05-07.
positives: Revenue growth 111.6% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Gross margin 69.4% — strong unit economics on services rendered.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $138.90.
Total cash $2.27B provides some liquidity, though insufficient given burn rate.
negatives: Operating margin -6.9% and Profit margin -25.6% — substantial losses on operations.
Free cash flow (TTM) $-8.56B — extremely high cash burn.
Debt/Equity 738.54 and Total debt $35.15B — highly leveraged balance sheet.
Forward P/E -165.64 and Analyst growth est, current FY -136.5% — priced for massive future turnaround.

news.paragraph: CoreWeave is reportedly building its enterprise business, particularly within financial services, and is being highlighted as a pick in the AI supply chain sector. Recent news also points to significant AI compute costs in media production, underscoring the demand for specialized infrastructure. The company's focus on AI infrastructure positions it within a high-growth, albeit capital-intensive, market.

headlines.title: AI supply chain, Gen Z spending among hedge fund picks at Sohn Hong Kong
This Cannes Film Cost $500,000 to Make. $400,000 Was AI Compute Costs.
CoreWeave Building Up Enterprise Business, Led By Financial Services
